svg.title: The Epic of long-march
svg.desc: In the year 2011, the developer first set foot upon the public forge, and the epic began. And lo, ember-forge rose from nothing, and a hundred stars gathered to witness it. Then came the Dark Age: one hundred and ninety-seven days, and not a single commit. In the year 2015, the developer forsook Ruby, and there was much refactoring. And lo, iron-keep rose from nothing, and nine hundred stars gathered to witness it. Then came the Dark Age: three hundred and seventeen days, and not a single commit. And lo, starfall rose from nothing, and nine thousand stars gathered to witness it. Then came the Dark Age: three hundred and seventeen days, and not a single commit.
svg.text: Python Specialist · Star Magnet · Widely Forked · Followed
